name: WhiteHorse Finance Inc. 7.875% Notes due 2028
summary: WhiteHorse Finance, Inc. is a direct lender that provides financing to small and middle-market companies. The company invests in senior secured debt, second lien debt, and subordinated debt, typically in companies with $5 million to $50 million of EBITDA. WhiteHorse Finance is managed by H.I.G. Capital.
